creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a port of EZWGL-based file manager for X Window System.
   Ezfm is a EZWGL-based file manager for X Window System. It
offers most of the features one would expect from a file manager.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	ezfm-0.1
#	ezfm-0.1/Makefile
#	ezfm-0.1/files
#	ezfm-0.1/files/md5
#	ezfm-0.1/patches
#	ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ae
#	ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ad
#	ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ac
#	ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ab
#	ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-aa
#	ezfm-0.1/pkg
#	ezfm-0.1/pkg/PLIST
#	ezfm-0.1/pkg/COMMENT
#	ezfm-0.1/pkg/DESCR
#
echo c - ezfm-0.1
mkdir -p ezfm-0.1 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ezfm-0.1/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >ezfm-0.1/Makefile << 'END-of-ezfm-0.1/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	ezfm
X# Version required:			0.1
X# Date created:				27 July 1998
X# Whom:					Andrey Zakhvatov
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	EZFM-0.1-src
XPKGNAME=	ezfm-0.1
XCATEGORIES=	x11
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.ma.utexas.edu/pub/mzou/
XEXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
X
XMAINTAINER=	andy@icc.surw.chel.su
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	jpeg\\.9\\.:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/jpeg \
X		EZ\\.1\\.:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/EZWGL
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/EZFM-0.1
XUSE_X11=	yes
X
XMAN1=		ezfm.1
X
Xdo-install:
X	@ ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/ezfm ${PREFIX}/bin
X	@ ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/ezfm
X.for file in ezfmExtension ezfmMagic ezfmrc
X	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${file} ${PREFIX}/share/ezfm
X.endfor
X	@ ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/ezfm/ezfmIcons
X	@ cd ${WRKSRC}/ezfmIcons; tar -cf - . | (cd ${PREFIX}/share/ezfm/ezfmIcons; tar -xf - )
X	@ ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${MAN1} ${PREFIX}/man/man1
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	@ ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/ezfm
X	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/COPYING ${PREFIX}/share/doc/ezfm
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-ezfm-0.1/Makefile
echo c - ezfm-0.1/files
mkdir -p ezfm-0.1/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ezfm-0.1/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >ezfm-0.1/files/md5 << 'END-of-ezfm-0.1/files/md5'
XMD5 (EZFM-0.1-src.tgz) = 71242398196d974ed8b77265e9600299
END-of-ezfm-0.1/files/md5
echo c - ezfm-0.1/patches
mkdir -p ezfm-0.1/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ae
sed 's/^X//' >ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ae << 'END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ae'
X--- libfile/Makefile	Mon Jun 29 16:13:19 1998
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/libfile/Makefile	Thu Jul 30 11:25:39 1998
X@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
X # Makefile 
X-MAGIC	= /etc/ezfmMagic
X+MAGIC	= ${PREFIX}/share/ezfm/ezfmMagic
X CC	= cc
X CFLAGS	=  	
X 
X@@ -18,6 +18,6 @@
X 		rm -f *.o core File
X 
X .c.o:
X-	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c  $<
X+	$(CC) -DMAGIC=\"${MAGIC}\" $(CFLAGS) -c  $<
X 
X #--end--
END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ae
echo x - ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ad
sed 's/^X//' >ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ad << 'END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ad'
X--- main.c	Mon Jun 29 19:02:41 1998
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/main.c	Thu Jul 30 11:22:42 1998
X@@ -65,7 +65,7 @@
X  */
X static char *fallbackResources = 
X /* initialization file name */
X-"ezfm*ezfmrc:    ezfmrc:~/.ezfmrc:/etc/ezfmrc:/usr/lib/ezfm/ezfmrc:/usr/local/lib/ezfm/ezfmrc
X+"ezfm*ezfmrc:    ezfmrc:~/.ezfmrc:/etc/ezfmrc:/usr/X11R6/share/ezfm/ezfmrc:/usr/local/lib/ezfm/ezfmrc
X "
X /* fonts used in display items */
X "
END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ad
echo x - ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ac
sed 's/^X//' >ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ac << 'END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ac'
X--- infoBtn.c	Thu Jun 25 16:09:58 1998
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/infoBtn.c	Thu Jul 30 11:27:26 1998
X@@ -292,7 +292,7 @@
X     }
X }
X /**************************************************************************/
X-static void setmode(widget, data)  EZ_Widget *widget; void *data; 
X+static void _setmode(widget, data)  EZ_Widget *widget; void *data; 
X {
X   char str[12];
X   infoControl *ptr = (infoControl *)data;
X@@ -349,7 +349,7 @@
X 			       EZ_GRID_CELL_GEOMETRY,  2, idx , 1, 1,
X 			       EZ_CLIENT_INT_DATA,     rr,
X 			       EZ_CLIENT_PTR_DATA,     clabel,
X-			       EZ_CALLBACK,            setmode, data,
X+			       EZ_CALLBACK,            _setmode, data,
X 			       NULL);
X   label =      EZ_CreateWidget(EZ_WIDGET_CHECK_BUTTON, tframe,
X 			       EZ_LABEL_STRING,        "write",
X@@ -360,7 +360,7 @@
X 			       EZ_CLIENT_INT_DATA,     ww,
X 			       EZ_CLIENT_PTR_DATA,     clabel,
X 			       EZ_GRID_CELL_GEOMETRY,  3, idx , 1, 1, 
X-			       EZ_CALLBACK,            setmode, data,
X+			       EZ_CALLBACK,            _setmode, data,
X 			       NULL);
X   label =      EZ_CreateWidget(EZ_WIDGET_CHECK_BUTTON, tframe,
X 			       EZ_LABEL_STRING,        "execute",
X@@ -371,7 +371,7 @@
X 			       EZ_CLIENT_PTR_DATA,     clabel,
X 			       EZ_CHECK_BUTTON_ON_OFF,  xx&mode,
X 			       EZ_GRID_CELL_GEOMETRY,  4, idx , 1, 1, 
X-			       EZ_CALLBACK,            setmode, data,
X+			       EZ_CALLBACK,            _setmode, data,
X 			       NULL);
X }
X 
END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ac
echo x - ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ab
sed 's/^X//' >ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ab << 'END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ab'
X--- ezfm.h	Mon Jun 29 07:24:36 1998
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/ezfm.h	Thu Jul 30 11:02:31 1998
X@@ -53,7 +53,7 @@
X #endif
X /*************************************************************/
X EXTERN   int erron, sys_nerr;
X-EXTERN   char *sys_errlist[];
X+/* EXTERN   char *sys_errlist[]; */
X #define syserr(en) (((en) >= 0 && (en) < sys_nerr) ? sys_errlist[(en)] : "Unknown error")
X #define SECONDS_IN_YEAR         31536000
X #define SelectionBackground     "yellow"
END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-ab
echo x - ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-aa'
X--- Makefile	Thu Jul  2 17:27:53 1998
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/Makefile	Thu Jul 30 11:11:08 1998
X@@ -1,31 +1,35 @@
X+#
X+# Prefix definition
X+#
X+PREFIX?=/usr/X11R6
X #-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
X #
X # Where to install the default magic file.
X #
X-EZFM_MAGIC=/usr/local/lib/ezfm/ezfmMagic
X-EZFM_EXTENSION=/usr/local/lib/ezfm/ezfmExtension
X+EZFM_MAGIC=${PREFIX}/share/ezfm/ezfmMagic
X+EZFM_EXTENSION=${PREFIX}/share/ezfm/ezfmExtension
X #
X # Where to install default initialization file
X # this file is consulted if ~/.ezfmrc $EZFMRC
X # are not found.
X #
X-EZFM_RC=/usr/local/lib/ezfm/ezfmrc
X+EZFM_RC=${PREFIX}/share/ezfm/ezfmrc
X 
X #
X # Where to install the icons
X #
X-EZFM_ICONS=/usr/local/lib/ezfm/ezfmIcons
X+EZFM_ICONS=${PREFIX}/share/ezfm/ezfmIcons
X #
X # Where to install the binary
X #
X-BIN=/usr/local/bin
X+BIN=${PREFIX}/bin
X #
X #----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
X #
X-CC= gcc  -O -DLINUX
X+CC+= -I${PREFIX}/include
X #
X #----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
X-LIBS = libfile.a  -lEZ  ../jpeg/libjpeg.a -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11 -lXext  -lm  -lc
X+LIBS = libfile.a  -lEZ -ljpeg -L/usr/local/lib -L${X11BASE}/lib -lX11 -lXext -lm  -lc
X 
X 
X SRC= action.c folder.c atoms.c clientMessage.c main.c icons.c items.c finfo.c \
X@@ -54,7 +58,7 @@
X 	cp ezfm $(BIN)
X 
X libfile.a:
X-	(cd libfile; make libfile.a CC="gcc -O"; mv libfile.a ../ )
X+	(cd libfile; make libfile.a; mv libfile.a ../ )
X 
X ezfmMagic:
X 	(cd libfile/Magdir; make all)
END-of-ezfm-0.1/patches/patch-aa

mkdir -p ezfm-0.1/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
